## createStaticTokenAuthorizer() function

Creates a simple shared-secret token authorizer.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createStaticTokenAuthorizer(
  options: StaticTokenAuthorizerOptions,
): RequestAuthorizer;
```

</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[RequestAuthorizer](./pi-ws.requestauthorizer.md)

Reusable request authorizer.

## Remarks

This helper can validate either a header such as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`<!-- -->, a query-string parameter such as `?token=<token>`<!-- -->, or both.
